title: Fast message to All
excerpt: How can I send a quick message to all members of a board?

posts.author: AleRun (Alessandro)
posts.cookedHtml: How can I send a quick message to all members of a board?

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @AleRun

To send a message to everyone on a board, simply open the updates section and @mention everyone on this board.

The update when sent will trigger a notification to anyone subscribed to the board so do make sure you’ve subscribed the right people in the board subscribers box before sending.

Does that help?

Thanks

posts.author: AleRun (Alessandro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Julia-monday.com:

To send a message to everyone on a board, simply open the updates section and @mention everyone on this board.

Are you referring to this section?

com_my_inbox3040×886 143 KB

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @AleRun
No you do it from the board itself. That is the inbox (https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/115005309885-What-is-the-Inbox-?abcb=2)

On the board, you can have a group at the top and call it General, then add an item and call it “Talks”. Then write an update there to @ everyone on this board which will then send a notification to the bell of anyone who is subscribed to the board (https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/115005312649-The-Subscribe-Option?abcb=23676)

121781×796 129 KB

Does that explain it better?
